findings.name: DEGRADED fix for vik-minikube
findings.actual: vik-minikube shows Degraded (red badge). Card displays 'Degraded (2)' section with vik-minikube listed under it. Note: cluster dropdown in header shows 🟢 for vik-minikube, but card status badge still says Degraded.

findings.name: Timestamp near stat cards
findings.expected: Updated X seconds ago or Updated just now
findings.actual: Timestamp visible as 'Updated 16s ago' and updates to 'Updated just now' after refresh

findings.name: Refresh button functionality
findings.expected: RefreshCw icon spins while loading, button disabled during load, data refreshes
findings.actual: Refresh button present with icon. Data refreshes (timestamp resets to 'just now'). Spin/disable state could not be captured - operation completes too fast for screenshot capture. Functionally works.
